message:
feat(unittest): Implement CPython-compatible submodule APIs

Replace stub files with full implementations matching CPython's
unittest module structure:

- result.zig: TestResult with startTest, stopTest, addSuccess,
  addFailure, addError, addSkip, wasSuccessful, failfast support
- suite.zig: BaseTestSuite and TestSuite with countTestCases,
  addTest, addTests, run, debug methods
- loader.zig: TestLoader with loadTestsFromTestCase, discover,
  getTestCaseNames, defaultTestLoader singleton
- main.zig: TestProgram with parseArgs, createTests, runTests,
  verbosity, failfast, catchbreak, buffer options
- signals.zig: installHandler, registerResult, removeResult,
  removeHandler for SIGINT handling (graceful test interruption)
- util.zig: strclass, safe_repr, sorted_list_difference,
  unorderable_list_difference, three_way_cmp, generateDiff
- _log.zig: CapturingHandler, AssertLogsContext for assertLogs
  and assertNoLogs support
- async_case.zig: IsolatedAsyncioTestCase with asyncSetUp,
  asyncTearDown, addAsyncCleanup for async test support
- __main__.zig: Entry point for 'python -m unittest' with
  discover command support
